text:
Created attachment 239093
git diff for net/unix2tcp

The git diff attached to this pr(1) updates net/unix2tcp
to version 0.8.3.

Changelog:
Move source to public repo to encourage further (develop|improve)ment
Provide a working WWW
Fixes (adds) missing prototypes
...stuff I've forgotten

Changes
Makefile
distinfo

That's it.

Thanks!

P.S. I'm MAINTAINER, so approval is implicit. :-)
